title: Spring Bears Love
overview: A connected series of love notes scribbled in library art books convinces grocery store clerk Hyun-chae that a mystery man, known only as 'Vincent', is pursuing a relationship with her.  Meanwhile, a friend from her high-school days, subway driver Dong-ha, has relocated to Seoul to pursue a relationship with her.
cast_top5: Bae Doona|Kim Nam-jin|Yoon Ji-hye|Lim Hyun-kyung|Yoon Jong-shin
